name: RAWG Video Games Database
description: The largest open video games database with 500,000+ games, ratings, reviews, and metadata.
longDescription: RAWG is the largest video game database and game discovery service. The API provides access to over 500,000 games across 50 platforms including PC, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, and mobile. Data includes ratings, Metacritic scores, release dates, genres, tags, screenshots, trailers, and detailed game descriptions. The API supports complex filtering and searching.
pricing: Free: unlimited requests with API key registration
affiliateText: Building a game discovery app? Deploy on Vercel with global CDN — free tier available.
